achievements.title: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
achievements.description: Completed an intensive, hands-on program focused on foundational security operations, risk management, and threat mitigation. Developed practical skills in vulnerability assessment, incident response, and network security using industry-standard tools including Python, SQL, Linux, and SIEM systems.

achievements.title: African Digital Conference (Digital Africa Rising 2026)
achievements.description: Represented Zambia on a continental stage as the Founder of the Youth Digital Empowerment Network during the 3-day regional summit, collaborating with leaders across 7 African nations to transform digital innovation into scalable impact.
